_comment: Named corners as FRACTION OF LAP from start/finish. Validated by curvature detection over the real geometry, which confirmed every bacinger geojson starts at start/finish and runs in racing direction, and whose detected apexes these fractions match. Famous names where a track has them; a few notable turn numbers otherwise. Keyed by the same file id as geojson/ and tracks.json. Remaining tracks (mostly numbered layouts with few famous names) get added the same way.
